occurrence_sentence: "A key goal of Quantum.Tech is to help enterprises understand, and build a strategy for, adopting Quantum technologies," said Amit Das, Quantum.Tech CEO and Co-Founder.
"A key goal of Quantum.Tech is to help enterprises understand, and build a strategy for, adopting Quantum technologies," said Amit Das, Quantum.Tech CEO and Co-Founder.

"Quantum computing, communications, and sensing are transformational technologies," said Das, "If you want to understand how your industry will be impacted by these technologies, then you must attend Quantum.Tech."

occurrence_sentence: With a several-decades long background in journalism and communications, Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience.
